name: Accurate
description: Gain a bonus of +10 to any Test when firing this weapon.

name: Blackpowder
description: If you are targeted by a Blackpowder weapon, you must pass an Average (+20) Cool Test or take a Broken Condition, even if the shot misses.

name: Blast
description: All Characters within (Rating) yards of the struck target point take SL+Weapon Damage, and suffer any Conditions the weapon inflicts.

name: Blast 3
description: All Characters within 3 yards of the struck target point take SL+Weapon Damage, and suffer any Conditions the weapon inflicts.

name: Blast 4
description: All Characters within 4 yards of the struck target point take SL+Weapon Damage, and suffer any Conditions the weapon inflicts.

name: Blast 5
description: All Characters within 5 yards of the struck target point take SL+Weapon Damage, and suffer any Conditions the weapon inflicts.

name: Damaging
description: A Damaging weapon can use the higher score from either the units die or the SL to determine the Damage caused from a successful hit.

name: Defensive
description: Wielding one grants a +1 SL bonus to Melee Tests when opposing an attack.

name: Distract
description: A successful attack with a Distracting weapon forces an opponent back 1 yard per SL by which the Opposed Test is won, instead of causing Damage.

name: Entangle
description: A successful hit inflicts the Entangled Condition with a Strength value equal to the wielder's Strength Characteristic. While entangling, the weapon cannot be used to hit, but the entanglement can be ended at will.

name: Fast
description: A wielder can attack outside the normal Initiative sequence (first, last, or in-between). Melee Tests to defend against Fast weapons without the Fast quality suffer a -10 penalty.

name: Hack
description: Hitting an opponent Damages a struck piece of armour or shield by 1 point and wounds the target.

name: Impact
description: On a successful hit, the units die result of the attack roll is added to the Damage caused by an Impact weapon.

name: Impale
description: They also cause a Critical Hit on attack rolls divisible by 10. If from a ranged weapon, the ammunition lodges, requiring a Challenging (+0) Heal Test (arrows/bolts) or a surgeon (bullets) to remove; 1 Wound cannot be healed for each unremoved projectile.

name: Incendiary
description: Gives 1+SL Ablaze Conditions.

name: Penetrating
description: Non-metal APs are ignored, and the first point of all other armour is ignored.

name: Pistol
description: This weapon can be used for attacks in Close Combat.

name: Precise
description: Gain +1 SL bonus to any successful Test when attacking with them.

name: Pummel
description: If a Head hit is scored with a Pummel weapon, an Opposed Strength/Endurance test is attempted against the struck opponent. Winning grants the opponent a Stunned Condition.

name: Repeater 4
description: The weapon holds 4 shots and reloads automatically after each shot. Once all shots are used, a full reload is required using normal rules.

name: Shield 1
description: When opposing an incoming attack, the wielder counts as having 1 Armour Point on all body locations.

name: Shield 2
description: When opposing an incoming attack, the wielder counts as having 2 Armour Points on all body locations. The wielder may also oppose incoming missile shots in their Line of Sight.

name: Shield 3
description: When opposing an incoming attack, the wielder counts as having 3 Armour Points on all body locations. The wielder may also oppose incoming missile shots in their Line of Sight.

name: Slash
description: Causes a Bleeding Condition on a Critical Hit.

name: Trap-blade
description: If a Critical is scored when defending against a bladed weapon attack, the wielder can choose to trap it instead of causing a Critical Hit. This involves an Opposed Strength Test, adding SL from the previous Melee Test. Success means the opponent drops the blade; Astounding Success means the blade breaks unless it has Unbreakable. Failure means the opponent frees the blade.

name: Unbreakable
description: The weapon is expertly made from strong material and will not break, corrode, or lose its edge under almost all circumstances.

name: Wrap
description: Melee Tests opposing an attack from a Wrap weapon suffer a penalty of -1SL.

name: Dangerous
description: Failed test with 9 or 90 causes fumble.

name: Imprecise
description: -1 SL on attacks.

name: Reload 1
description: Requires Extended Ranged Test of 1 SL to reload.

name: Reload 2
description: Requires Extended Ranged Test of 2 SL to reload.

name: Reload 3
description: Requires Extended Ranged Test of 3 SL to reload.

name: Reload 4
description: Requires Extended Ranged Test of 4 SL to reload.

name: Reload 5
description: Requires Extended Ranged Test of 5 SL to reload.

name: Slow
description: Attack last in initiative. Defenders get +1 SL to defend.

name: Tiring
description: Only get Impact and Damaging bonus if charging.

name: Unbalanced
description: -1 SL when parrying.

name: Undamaging
description: AP is doubled against these attacks. No minimum damage.
